name: Stripe
description: Connect agents to Stripe for payment processing, billing, invoices, and subscription management via the official Stripe Agent Toolkit MCP server

fields.label: Stripe Secret Key
fields.description: Stripe API secret key (recommended: use a Restricted API Key rk_* for better security)

testMode.description: Use Stripe test mode (sk_test_*) instead of live mode

connectedAccount.description: Optional Stripe connected account ID for Connect platforms (acct_*)
